positive: Minimalist celestial map illustration featuring constellations like Ursa Major and Orion, interconnected by fine, glowing golden lines. The background is a deep indigo cosmic void, contrasting with brilliant points of starlight. The style should evoke vintage scientific diagrams (engraving style, blueprint aesthetic) combined with modern graphic simplicity. The main elements should be clean silhouettes and vector-like lines, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Composition is centered and balanced, with a perfect circle frame containing the main star map. Flat lay composition, high contrast, single spotlight effect, maximal legibility and print-friendliness.
negative: blurry, photorealistic, 3d render, text, words, watermark, signature, noisy, artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy lines, oil paint, watercolor
